title: HPLC-MS Protocol for Paracetamol Quantification: A Step- by-Step Laboratory Guide
author: javaid, Maryam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A reproducible HPLC-MS method for paracetamol quantification in tablets was validated using standard addition to address matrix effects. The protocol employs a Kinetex C18 column (water/methanol/acetic acid) with ESI+-MS detection (15-min runtime). Achieved linearity (R² = 0.999), recovery (99% ± 1.2%), and excipient screening (caffeine/aspirin). Ideal for pharmaceutical QC and teaching labs, with open data available for calibration and chromatograms.
